## How verified

<!-- Commands you ran, tests added, manual checks. -->

- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] Updated docs where relevant

## Checklist

- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit -s` — see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md))
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or internal hostnames/account IDs in the diff
- [ ] Change is focused and matches surrounding conventions
